title: HTML & CSS Full Course – Beginner to Pro
description: Complete HTML and CSS course covering all fundamentals from beginner to advanced. Learn how to build professional websites from scratch.

title: What Is Life? Is Death Real?
description: Kurzgesagt explores the deep question of what life actually is, and what it means for something to be alive or dead.

title: The Egg – A Short Story
description: A mind-bending animated short film about the meaning of existence, based on the short story by Andy Weir.

title: JavaScript Tutorial for Beginners – Full Course
description: Learn JavaScript from scratch in this beginner-friendly full course. Covers variables, functions, DOM and more.

title: The Most Efficient Way to Destroy the Universe – False Vacuum
description: What if the universe is fundamentally unstable and could collapse at any moment? Kurzgesagt explains false vacuum theory.

title: Full Body Workout for Beginners – No Equipment
description: A complete beginner full body workout — no gym, no equipment needed. Burn fat and build muscle at home.

title: Loneliness
description: An honest exploration of loneliness — what it is, why it hurts, and how to deal with it. One of Kurzgesagt's most beloved videos.

title: Python Tutorial – Python Full Course for Beginners
description: Learn Python with the #1 Python tutorial on YouTube. Covers all beginner topics clearly and fast.

title: Big Buck Bunny – Official Blender Short Film
description: Big Buck Bunny — the beloved open-source animated short film by the Blender Foundation. Fully embeddable.

title: $456,000 Squid Game In Real Life!
description: MrBeast recreates Squid Game in real life with $456,000 on the line. 456 players compete in epic challenges including Red Light Green Light and Glass Bridge!

title: Ages 1 - 100 Decide Who Wins $250,000
description: MrBeast gathers people ages 1 through 100 and they decide who wins the grand prize of $250,000. Heartwarming and hilarious!

title: Real Life Trick Shots
description: Dude Perfect takes trick shots to the next level - performing impossible basketball, frisbee and everyday object trick shots in real life locations.

title: Impossible Ping Pong Trick Shots
description: The Dude Perfect crew attempts the most insane ping pong trick shots ever — from impossible angles, bounces, and combos.

title: Backyard Squirrel Maze 1.0 – Ninja Warrior Course
description: Squirrels were stealing bird seed so Mark Rober solved the problem with an epic Ninja Warrior obstacle course in his backyard. Engineering meets hilarious wildlife.

title: Binging with Babish: $5 Shake from Pulp Fiction
description: Babish recreates the iconic five-dollar shake from Pulp Fiction, exploring different recipes to find the perfect vanilla milkshake.

title: 100 Hours in America's Strange 'Cult City'
description: Yes Theory spends 100 hours inside one of America's strangest communities — discovering an incredible story of faith, community, and the human desire to belong.

title: The World's Most Important Machine
description: How ASML's EUV lithography machines make the world's most advanced computer chips — the pinnacle of human engineering.

title: VFX Artists React to Bad & Great CGI 198
description: Professional VFX artists break down the best and worst CGI in movies, revealing the secrets behind Hollywood's visual effects.

title: Eating INDIAN STREET FOOD for 7 Days!! – Ultimate India Food Tour
description: Mark Wiens goes on the ultimate Indian street food tour — 7 days of the most incredible street food across India, from Mumbai to Delhi.
